title: Add a clock face and hour and...

history.content: Add a clock face and hour and minute tick marks to the analog clock's canvas circle, drawn as inward-pointing lines from the rim. Hour marks every 30°, minute marks every 6°.

### Plan (1 steps)
1. Add a clock face and hour and minute tick marks to the analog clock's canvas circle, drawn as inward-pointing lines from the rim. Hour marks every 30°, minute marks every 6°.

### Results
**Step 1:** The clock already has tick marks (hour marks at 30° intervals, minute marks at 6° intervals). I need to add the clock face (the circular area/rim). Let me add the clock face circle:The modification has been completed. I added the clock face (a white oval circle) to the canvas. The tick marks were al
The black hour and minuite hands and markings are hidden on the white background
